title: 15 eggless flavours at Harris Park — including Rasmalai and Mango
summary:
Fifteen flavours. Not fifteen variations of vanilla — fifteen genuinely distinct choices, including Rasmalai and Mango, made for Western Sydney families who know the difference.

Every cake is 100% eggless. No asking, no checking, no alternatives. That's been true since 2019 in Harris Park, which is why families from Westmead, Parramatta, and Merrylands keep coming back for the same milestones, year after year.

Six sizes from 6-inch to 16-inch. Buttercream, fondant, or ganache. Custom designs and photo cakes accepted — send us a reference and we'll match it.

48 hours minimum notice. Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725.
keywords: Rasmalai Mango eggless cake Harris Park
eggless custom cake Westmead Parramatta Merrylands
eggless cake Indian flavours Western Sydney
